  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "What kind of check do you want as the primary focus? Choose one (or a small subset): A) Writing polish and readability only (R1.6), B) Argument and evidence check—logical consistency and whether reported results support claims (R1.2, R1.3), C) Novelty/positioning versus prior work and citations (R1.4, R1.7), D) High-level reframing/reorganization of the section (R1.1, R1.5).",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The request is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended checking scope must be disclosed and resolved.",
    "RX.2": "Without clear scope, it is important to avoid overclaiming what the projected responsibilities would cover.",
    "RX.3": "We must adhere to scope by projecting responsibilities only, not executing edits or evaluations of the artifact.",
    "RX.4": "Careful scoping helps prevent downstream harm from misinterpretation or misrepresentation of the work’s claims.",
    "RX.5": "We will maintain clear traceability between the artifact’s content and any responsibility mapping or assumptions."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: What kind of check do you want as the primary focus? Choose one (or a small subset): A) Writing polish and readability only (R1.6), B) Argument and evidence check—logical consistency and whether reported results support claims (R1.2, R1.3), C) Novelty/positioning versus prior work and citations (R1.4, R1.7), D) High-level reframing/reorganization of the section (R1.1, R1.5).

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended checking scope must be disclosed and resolved.
rationale.RX.2: Without clear scope, it is important to avoid overclaiming what the projected responsibilities would cover.
rationale.RX.3: We must adhere to scope by projecting responsibilities only, not executing edits or evaluations of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Careful scoping helps prevent downstream harm from misinterpretation or misrepresentation of the work’s claims.
rationale.RX.5: We will maintain clear traceability between the artifact’s content and any responsibility mapping or assumptions.
